message:
chore: update Cargo.lock for workspace dependency bumps

Reflects version bumps of asupersync, franken-decision, franken-evidence,
and franken-kernel to 0.2.8 with new transitive dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -104,19 +104,21 @@ checksum = "7c02d123df017efcdfbd739ef81735b36c5ba83ec3c59c80a9d7ecc718f92e50"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "asupersync"
-version = "0.2.6"
-source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
-checksum = "61e194ae95492f0e9bdf40266d5e04e5be34156fc650bc559200dea4146d5464"
+version = "0.2.8"
 dependencies = [
  "base64",
  "bincode-next",

  "crossbeam-queue",
  "franken-decision",
  "franken-evidence",

+ "js-sys",

  "memchr",
  "nix 0.31.2",

 ]
